description: Turla Carbon scenario — synthetic Microsoft Entra ID sign-in events modeled from the real msft_azure_ad_raw schema. 4 events: baseline auth, failed credential probe, service account misuse from compromised endpoint, and impossible travel via C2 relay IP. Used by SOCFWPoVSender to replay the Identity leg of the Turla Carbon attack chain.
name: SOCFWPoVData_Identity_TurlaCarbon_V1
